description_long: This object is a single slice of rustic, whole grain bread with an irregular, hand-torn edge and a slightly uneven, natural shape. The surface is textured with visible air pockets and a porous crumb, indicating a light, airy interior. The crust is medium-brown, slightly rough, and appears to have a few seeds or grains embedded along the edge, giving it a hearty, artisanal look. The slice is relatively thin, with a gentle curve and a tapering end, suggesting it was cut from a larger loaf. The coloration ranges from light tan in the interior to a deeper brown at the crust, with some subtle variations in tone. There are no visible markings, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, hand-torn slice of whole grain bread with a rough, seeded crust and a porous, airy interior.
description_view_0: This view shows the bread slice from the side, highlighting the rough, uneven crust and the airy, porous crumb.
description_view_1: This top-down view emphasizes the irregular, natural shape and the distribution of air pockets across the surface.
description_view_2: This angle displays the length of the slice, showing the thinness and the tapering, hand-torn edge.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the crusty edge and the slightly curved profile of the bread slice.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is rough and uneven, with a natural, hand-torn appearance and a few visible seeds or grains embedded along the edge. There is no visible scoring or flour dusting, and the crust color transitions from medium to dark brown.
